control_evidence.limit_up_down_filter: Round198 official Tushare stk_limit backfill has continuous 2015-01-01 through 2025-12-31 coverage with 12,936,279 rows and 8,130 entities after 132 monthly shards. Round199 rebuilt the reusable full-window tradeability mask cache with stock_basic L/D/P metadata plus official stk_limit, suspend_d, and namechange feeds: 10,785,537 rows, 4,428,680 entry-blocked rows, 4,380,619 exit-blocked rows, 613,142 official mask-hit rows, and 3,739,869 metadata mask-hit rows. A 2023 direct path versus metadata-complete cache parity check showed 0 differences for entry_tradeable, exit_tradeable, official masks, new_listing_flag, delisted_or_inactive_flag, board_permission_blocked, and blocked_reasons. The metadata-complete cached Round126 replay stayed rejected: 10,452 trades, 670.36% total return, 12.84% annualized return, Sharpe 0.251, overlap-adjusted Sharpe 0.255, max drawdown -58.49%, 2,773 tradeability-filtered trades, and 0 walk-forward candidates. This is process-control evidence, not profitability evidence.
control_evidence.suspension_filter: Round198 official Tushare suspend_d backfill has continuous 2015-01-01 through 2025-12-31 coverage with 332,011 rows and 4,373 entities after 132 monthly shards. The Round199 metadata-complete full-window tradeability mask cache includes official suspension masks; the 2023 direct path versus cache parity check showed 0 suspended_official differences. The metadata-complete Round126 replay filtered 13 exits, delayed 19 exits, accepted max exit delay 4 days, and remained hard-blocked with 0 walk-forward candidates. This is an implemented execution-control path; no factor promotion is implied.
control_evidence.st_flag_filter: Round198 official Tushare namechange backfill has continuous 2015-01-01 through 2025-12-31 coverage with 2,878 rows and 1,404 entities after 132 monthly shards. The year-sliced cache audit found and fixed a real defect: reading only the requested namechange year missed prior-year ST intervals that remained active in the requested year. A regression test now requires prior-year namechange intervals to block requested-year bars. The Round199 metadata-complete 2015-2025 cache kept official mask-hit rows at 613,142, and the 2023 direct path versus cache parity check showed 0 st_flag_official and 0 blocked_reasons differences. The metadata-complete Round126 replay still produced 0 walk-forward candidates.
control_evidence.new_listing_age_filter: Round199 metadata-complete full-window tradeability mask cache was rebuilt with stock_basic L/D/P metadata. The cache reports 323,923 new_listing_flag rows, and the 2023 direct path versus cache parity check showed 0 new_listing_flag differences.
control_evidence.delisting_risk_filter: Round199 tradeability data readiness audit with Round198 official backfill root found stock_basic L/D metadata ready: 5,855 stock_basic rows, 5,855 assets, list_status values D and L, and 327 D-status assets with non-null delist_date. The metadata-complete full-window cache reports 399,967 delisted_or_inactive_flag rows; 2023 direct-vs-cache parity showed 0 delisted_or_inactive_flag and blocked_reasons differences. Treat this as execution/universe filtering evidence, not survivorship-free fundamental membership evidence.
control_evidence.board_permission_filter: Round199 metadata-complete full-window tradeability mask cache was rebuilt with stock_basic exchange/stock_market metadata and default board permissions. The cache reports 3,317,705 board_permission_blocked rows, and the 2023 direct path versus cache parity check showed 0 board_permission_blocked differences.
control_evidence.financial_statement_ann_date_lag: Round200 added financial_pit_timing_audit and exposed stale/unmapped financial signal-date blockers in the Round95 Tushare fina_indicator shard1 full100 dataset. Round202 then added financial_pit_signal_date_filter, generating data/processed/round202_financial_pit_signal_filtered_20260623 with available_date, signal_date, and signal_lag_calendar_days. The filter kept 4,211 of 4,328 rows, dropped 116 stale rows above the 30-calendar-day lag threshold and 1 unmapped row, and the post-filter timing audit passed: 0 missing PIT rows, 0 ann_date-before-report-period rows, 0 exact duplicate key rows, 0 signal unmapped rows, 0 stale lag rows, max signal lag 30 days, and available_date present. This is data-readiness evidence only.
control_evidence.financial_revision_announcement_handling: Round200 financial_pit_timing_audit detects exact duplicate financial keys and same asset_id/end_date revision groups with distinct ann_date values. Unit coverage proves distinct revision ann_date rows are preserved and mapped to the first later trade date, while exact duplicate keys are blocked. Round202 financial_pit_signal_date_filter now preserves distinct revision rows, writes available_date/signal_date/signal_lag_calendar_days, and the post-filter real Round95 shard audit passed with 0 duplicate keys, 0 stale rows, and 0 unmapped rows. The real sample had 0 observed revision groups, so this is timing-control evidence, not profitability evidence.
control_evidence.report_release_lag_not_period_end: Round202 filtered financial PIT inputs use ann_date-driven signal_date/available_date and pass the strict first_trade_date_after_ann_date audit with report_period_only_availability_allowed=false and same_day_announcement_trading_allowed=false. The filtered root has 4,211 rows and 0 stale/unmapped signal-date blockers.
control_evidence.industry_exposure_report: Round203 added reusable industry_style_exposure_audit with per-date industry R2, missing-industry coverage, raw IC, residual IC, and factor-level classification. The startup gate now requires industry_style_exposure_audit_before_portfolio_grid before raw TopN expansion. This is a standard control artifact, not alpha evidence.
control_evidence.style_exposure_report: Round203 industry_style_exposure_audit reports required size, value, lowvol, momentum, and liquidity style correlations and blocks missing style coverage before portfolio grid search. Unit and CLI tests cover residual-survives and missing-style rejection paths.
control_evidence.size_value_lowvol_momentum_liquidity_dec: Round203 industry_style_exposure_audit standardizes the five-style decomposition table with max/mean absolute style correlation, style coverage ratio, and missing-style blockers for every candidate factor/horizon/lag row.
control_evidence.neutralized_factor_matrix_or_residual_op: Round203 industry_style_exposure_audit writes residual_factor_rows after cross-sectional residualization on industry dummies and size/value/lowvol/momentum/liquidity controls. Startup now rejects raw TopN without residual_factor_matrix_before_portfolio_grid confirmation.
control_evidence.stock_vs_etf_scope_boundary: Startup gate requires CN stock scope and rejects ETF rotation evidence for this branch.
control_evidence.cn_etf_dedicated_signal_pack_for_etf_rot: This quality gate is scoped to CN stock cross-sectional factor mining on the office_desktop branch. ETF rotation signals require a separate CN_ETF task, universe, signal pack, and evidence packet, so ETF-specific signal construction is not applicable to CN stock promotion evidence and must not be inferred from CN stock data.
control_evidence.risk_budget_position_sizing: Round201 added a reusable portfolio_construction_policy_gate and a default CN stock policy at configs/portfolio_construction_policy_cn_stock.json. The real policy gate passed with max_single_name_weight 5%, max_position_adv_participation 1% of ADV, and max_gross_exposure 1.0. Future portfolio conversion and walk-forward promotion review must consume this artifact before interpreting TopN returns.
control_evidence.volatility_targeting: Round201 portfolio_construction_policy_gate passed with volatility targeting enabled, target annual volatility 15%, max annual volatility 25%, and 60-day lookback. This is a construction policy gate, not alpha evidence.
control_evidence.industry_weight_constraints: Round201 portfolio_construction_policy_gate passed with max_industry_weight 25%, max benchmark-relative industry deviation 10%, and min_industry_count 5. This blocks raw TopN concentration from being treated as promotable portfolio evidence.
control_evidence.turnover_constraints: Round201 portfolio_construction_policy_gate passed with max_one_way_turnover_per_rebalance 35%, max_annual_turnover 6.0, max_cost_degradation_pct 35%, and rebalance_churn_limit 50%. Existing cost/capacity diagnostics must now be interpreted against this policy.
control_evidence.stop_loss_or_de_risk_rules: Round201 portfolio_construction_policy_gate passed with max_drawdown_soft_tolerance 30%, de_risk_drawdown_threshold 30%, hard_stop_drawdown_threshold 45%, and capacity/tradeability gates remaining hard. This matches the user's drawdown tolerance while preserving execution/capacity blockers.
control_evidence.deflated_sharpe: Round144 added factor_statistical_reality_check with Probabilistic Sharpe and conservative Deflated Sharpe approximation, plus CLI artifacts under data/reports/factor_statistical_reality_check_round144_*.
control_evidence.cpcv_purged_cross_validation: Round144 added purged CPCV split planning with optional embargo; verified on Round141 fold-level test_start_date data with 3 generated CPCV splits.
control_evidence.white_reality_check_or_fdr: Round144 added reusable Benjamini-Hochberg FDR accounting in factor_statistical_reality_check; White Reality Check bootstrap is still a future enhancement, but this OR-control is satisfied by FDR.
control_evidence.parameter_sensitivity_heatmap: Round144 added parameter sensitivity heatmap over two parameter axes and tested cost_bps/portfolio_value stability on Round126 and Round141 examples.
control_evidence.final_holdout_readiness_audit: Round145 added final_holdout_readiness_audit to prove bars, factor signals, and chronological test folds actually touch the read-once final-holdout window before any result is interpreted.
control_evidence.final_holdout_result_audit: Round145 added final_holdout_result_audit to block paper gate when aggregate-accepted cases fail the final-holdout fold; Round145 daily-basic free-float candidate had 6 aggregate accepted cases and 0 holdout-passed cases.
control_evidence.policy_liquidity_regime: Round205 added china_market_regime_control_gate and passed the CN stock regime policy. SHIBOR fields are explicitly allowed as PIT regime controls from processed/external_macro_rates with available_date and PIT joins required; LPR fields remain blocked because Round190 found 0 non-null lpr_1y/lpr_5y rows. Standalone policy-liquidity alpha claims are disallowed.
control_evidence.credit_cycle_proxy: Round205 china_market_regime_control_gate passed credit_cycle_proxy as a PIT regime-control layer using processed/external_margin_detail fields such as rzye, rzmre, and rzrqye. Prior Round192-193 margin-credit alpha attempts remain hibernated after residual IC failure; this control is for stratification/coverage only, not alpha promotion.
control_evidence.northbound_margin_turnover_temperature: Round205 china_market_regime_control_gate passed northbound_margin_turnover_temperature as a PIT regime-control layer using processed/external_hk_hold, processed/external_hsgt_flow, and processed/external_margin_detail. Prior positive northbound accumulation alpha remains rejected after Round191 zero-lead evidence.
control_evidence.index_location_state: Round205 china_market_regime_control_gate passed index_location_state as a PIT regime-control layer using processed/external_index_state fields including close, turnover_rate, pe, pe_ttm, and pb. This is market-state stratification evidence, not profitability evidence.
control_evidence.earnings_forecast_events: Round206 added event_factor_control_gate and passed the CN stock event-control policy. Forecast events are closed as a hibernated event-control after Round146 endpoint smoke and Round147 PIT/neutralized IC prescreen found weak or negative forecast evidence with 0 promotable factors. Event alpha and event portfolio grids remain disabled; this is risk-control evidence, not profitability evidence.
control_evidence.dividend_ex_right_events: Round206 event_factor_control_gate passed the dividend/ex-right control as controlled_retest_only. Round146 found dividend rows and Round147 produced one PIT dividend lead, but Round148 showed high public-yield/value exposure, residual ICIR below gate, and yearly instability. Raw yield-like dividend evidence is blocked from portfolio grids unless public-yield residualization, yearly stability, and long-cycle walk-forward checks pass.
control_evidence.buyback_holder_change_unlock_events: Round206 event_factor_control_gate passed the buyback/holder/unlock control as coverage_blocked. Round146 found repurchase, holder-number, and top-holder rows; Round147 PIT/neutralized IC checks were weak, while share_float and pledge_stat remain 0-row blocked. Missing event endpoints now block only this event family, not non-event direct factor generation.
control_evidence.index_rebalance_events: Round204 added TushareAdapter.fetch_index_weight plus a reusable index_rebalance_event_audit that converts index_weight snapshots into PIT-safe added, removed, and weight_changed events with available_date set to the first open trade date strictly after trade_date. A live CSI300 2023-2024 smoke used 7,000 index_weight rows, 494 calendar rows, 24 snapshot dates, and produced 358 event rows: 228 added, 28 removed, and 102 weight_changed, with 0 blockers. This is event coverage/control evidence only, not alpha evidence.

control_next_actions.limit_up_down_filter: Use the Round199 metadata-complete full-window tradeability mask cache for every old-candidate replay and every new CN stock profitability claim; keep direct-vs-cache parity checks in the startup protocol.
control_next_actions.suspension_filter: Use the Round199 metadata-complete full-window tradeability mask cache for replay and mining; continue reporting exit-filtered and delayed-exit counts in every portfolio result.
control_next_actions.st_flag_filter: Never reuse pre-fix stale cache results. Keep the cross-year namechange interval regression and direct-vs-cache parity check before new factor mining or promotion claims.
control_next_actions.delisting_risk_filter: Use stock_basic L/D/P metadata in every full-window tradeability mask cache. Continue treating it as execution/universe filtering evidence; do not claim full historical PIT membership unless a true membership-history feed is added.
control_next_actions.financial_statement_ann_date_lag: Use data/processed/round202_financial_pit_signal_filtered_20260623, not the raw Round95 financial root, for future financial factor matrices; reject any future refresh until financial_pit_signal_date_filter and financial_pit_timing_audit both pass.
control_next_actions.financial_revision_announcement_handling: Keep exact duplicate financial keys as hard blockers. For any refreshed financial root, rerun financial_pit_signal_date_filter and financial_pit_timing_audit; if observed revision groups appear, confirm each distinct ann_date maps only to a later signal_date before factor generation.
control_next_actions.report_release_lag_not_period_end: Keep report-period-only labels out of signal generation. Require available_date/signal_date and signal_lag_calendar_days in every financial factor matrix output.
control_next_actions.industry_exposure_report: Attach industry_style_exposure_audit.json and industry_date_rows.csv to every future candidate review before portfolio grids; reject candidates with insufficient industry coverage or industry-only translation.
control_next_actions.style_exposure_report: Attach style_exposure_rows.csv to every future candidate review; reject missing size/value/lowvol/momentum/liquidity coverage before interpreting IC or TopN returns.
control_next_actions.size_value_lowvol_momentum_liquidity_dec: Use the Round203 decomposition thresholds before expanding windows, lags, or TopN; rotate family if residual IC collapses after style decomposition.
control_next_actions.neutralized_factor_matrix_or_residual_op: Use residual_factor_rows.csv or an explicit residual-failure blocker before portfolio grid search; do not treat raw TopN returns as promotable without this artifact.
control_next_actions.cn_etf_dedicated_signal_pack_for_etf_rot: Keep this outside the CN stock branch and schedule a separate CN_ETF task for ETF flow, premium/discount, ETF volume shock, industry ETF strength, and macro state signals.
control_next_actions.risk_budget_position_sizing: Attach data/reports/round201_portfolio_construction_policy_gate_20260623/portfolio_construction_policy_gate.json to every future portfolio conversion and reject result packets that omit the risk budget fields.
control_next_actions.volatility_targeting: Report raw and volatility-targeted portfolio results separately; never let volatility targeting hide weak raw factor evidence.
control_next_actions.industry_weight_constraints: Wire industry weight checks into portfolio result packets once industry classification coverage is available.
control_next_actions.turnover_constraints: Wire max turnover, rebalance churn, and cost-degradation checks into walk-forward result packets.
control_next_actions.stop_loss_or_de_risk_rules: Apply drawdown/de-risk policy as a promotion review control; the 30% drawdown tolerance remains soft and does not waive tradeability, capacity, or extreme-trade gates.
control_next_actions.policy_liquidity_regime: Use SHIBOR only as a regime-control/stratification feature; keep LPR-dependent factors blocked until non-missing LPR coverage is repaired.
control_next_actions.credit_cycle_proxy: Use margin-detail fields as regime controls only. Revisit credit-cycle alpha only with a new preregistered orthogonal hypothesis and industry/style residual audit.
control_next_actions.northbound_margin_turnover_temperature: Use northbound and margin fields as regime controls only. Do not portfolio-grid prior positive northbound accumulation or failed margin-credit hypotheses without new orthogonal rationale.
control_next_actions.index_location_state: Attach index-state regime coverage to long-cycle replay and promotion review; do not treat index valuation/location alone as alpha evidence.
control_next_actions.earnings_forecast_events: Keep forecast events hibernated. Re-enter only with a new orthogonal preregistered event hypothesis plus PIT signal-date and industry/style residual IC audits.
control_next_actions.dividend_ex_right_events: Keep dividend/ex-right events in controlled-retest-only mode. Raw yield-like exposure cannot enter portfolio grids without public-yield residualization, yearly stability, and long-cycle walk-forward evidence.
control_next_actions.buyback_holder_change_unlock_events: Keep buyback/holder/unlock events locally coverage-blocked. Backfill share_float and pledge_stat before re-entering this family; do not let this block unrelated non-event factor mining.
control_next_actions.index_rebalance_events: Attach index_rebalance_event_audit.json and index_rebalance_events.csv before testing index inclusion/exclusion alpha; keep same-day event trading blocked and rerun coverage for each target index universe.
